given: Sentry user details update handles a staff or superuser who is no longer in the default organization

should_find.finding: user_details blocks staff or superuser elevation for users outside the default organization but leaves existing staff/superuser privileges in place instead of revoking them

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 05b41c4744af7233561bb3046f7b0fa458ee5783. user_details blocks staff or superuser elevation for users outside the default organization but leaves existing staff/superuser privileges in place instead of revoking them
